name: Touhou Danmaku Kagura Phantasia Lost
short_description: "The collapse of Gensokyo... it was all you - " To rebuild the now barren phantasia, Reimu's journey begins. A Touhou Project officially approved derivative rhythm action game.
detailed_description:
"The collapse of Gensokyo... it was you, Reimu - "

『Touhou Danmaku Kagura Phantasia Lost』is a Touhou Project officially approved derivative rhythm action game.

Two modes are available: the Story Mode, in which you can solve the mysteries of the destroyed Gensokyo through the Danmaku Kagura (rhythm game), and the Free Mode, in which you can play the rhythm game to your heart's content.

With 68 songs in the base game plus tracks from the announced / released Extra Song Packs Vol. 1–14, you can enjoy over 250 arrangements of Touhou music.

Game Experiences

Kagura Stage

In this mode you hit the notes at the right moment!

You can stack up combos and get a high score by hitting the notes consecutively coming through the 4 or 6 lanes.

Danmaku Stage

A totally new game experience that combines Danmaku shoot 'em up & Rhythm games!

Complete missions set for each stages and beat the stage!

Customizability to tune your rhythm experience

Change the notes' speed, adjust the location of the combo display,

change the notes' design, change all you want to give you a stress-free rhythm experience.

Characters

Featuring over 100 characters from Touhou Project. Characters are animated with Live2D.

Beautiful illustrations to color your game

Over 300 Mitama cards available to obtain through the progression of the game.

Amazing artists such as Yuu Kamiya (No Game No Life), Negi Haruba (The Quintessential Quintuplets), and many more have contributed to producing the fantastic works!

The only game where you can play Touhou Project Original Songs

Alongside many songs from the Touhou Project games, songs such as

"U.N. Owen Was Hero?" by Toby Fox & ZUN were written for this game! Accessible from Free Update.

[ Touhou Project Originals included in the base game ]

  • Phantom Band ~ Phantom Ensemble

  • Hartmann's Youkai Girl

  • Border of Life

  • U.N. Owen Was Her?

  • Crimson Belvedere ~ Eastern Dream...

  • Reach for the Moon, Immortal Smoke

  • Pure Furies ~ Whereabouts of the Heart

[ Touhou Project Originals included in the Paid DLCs ]

  • DLC vol.1: Love-colored Master Spark

  • DLC vol.2: Gensokyo Millennium ~ History of the Moon

  • DLC vol.3: The Shining Law of the Strong Eating the Weak

  • DLC vol.4: Septette for a Dead Princess

  • DLC vol.5: The Gensoukyou the Gods Loved

  • DLC vol.6: The World Is Made From Cuteness

  • DLC vol.7: Desire Drive

  • DLC vol.8: Maiden's Capriccio ~ Dream Battle

  • DLC vol.9: Entrust This World to Idols ~ Idolatrize World

  • DLC vol.10: A Soul as Scarlet as a Ground Cherry

  • DLC vol.11: Take Thy Danmaku In Hand, O Bulletphiles

  • DLC vol.12: Crazy Backup Dancers

  • DLC vol.13: Tonight Stars an Easygoing Egoist (Live ver.) ~ Egoistic Flowers.

  • DLC vol.14: A Star of Hope Rises in the Blue Sky / The Princess Who Slays Dragon Kings

[ Free Update ]

  • U.N. Owen Was Hero? - Toby Fox & ZUN

  • Beneath the Purple Cherry Blossoms Once Again - Collab with "Touhou Mystia's Izakaya"

  • Farewell Tour -  Collab with "Hifuu Club Activity Record"

  • Flawless Clothing of the Celestials (not)innocent?- Collab with the Three-Piece Band "fhána"

  • Megalovania of the Empty Corse - arranged by ZUN

  • Necrolovania - arranged by Toby Fox

  • Help me, ERINNNNNN!! - beatMARIO

  • Maware Gensou Festival - Theme song of Hakurei Jinja Reitaisai

  • Yurikago no Uta - Collab with "Marisa of Liartop Mountain"

  • Monopolistic Tycoon

  • Machikado no Mikosama

  • Independent Simulacrum

  • Re:Unknown X (marasy with String Quartet)
